key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the daemon should enforce charge thresholds.

key.name: threshold-start
key.description: Battery starts charging below this level.

key.name: threshold-end
key.description: Battery stops charging at this level.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: If false, the panel icon is hidden. Settings remain accessible from the Extensions app.

key.name: apply-trigger
key.description: Monotonic counter; bumping it asks the extension to push the current threshold values to the daemon. Used by the Apply button in Preferences so that editing values no longer auto-applies.
